## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass (`./gradlew test` / `pytest`)
- [ ] No lint warnings (`./gradlew lint` / `ruff check .`)
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or secrets
- [ ] Sensitivity gate checked for any new screen interactions
- [ ] SPRINT.md updated if task status changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Memory files updated if applicable (`memory/knowledge/`)
